name: @nexuscode/hooks
description: NexusCode lifecycle hooks + outbound webhooks (system-spec §24 Extensibility) — an ordered, error-isolated HookBus (in-process + Claude-Code-style command hooks; pre- hooks can veto/modify a tool call, run, or agent step) and a WebhookDispatcher that POSTs HMAC-signed, secret-redacted JSON payloads to external URLs behind the shared SSRF guard, with timeout and backoff retries.
